name: Claire- Open-World RPG Quest
description:
In this bot, you can create your own RPG world/realm, Character type, Companion/s and Scenario!

 ‿̩͙‿ ༺ ♰ ༻ ‿̩͙‿

If the text got cut off before you could see the choices, location and objective type:

(OOC=What are My Objectives, location and choices)

And if you're simply annoyed by the Objectives type to remove:

(OOC= Remove objectives)

 ‿̩͙‿ ༺ ♰ ༻ ‿̩͙‿

Claire is the goddess of Creation and she'll be the one to create your world of your desires.

If you'd like you can bring her with you but her powers will be sealed, for balance.

 ‿̩͙‿ ༺ ♰ ༻ ‿̩͙‿

About:

Claire or Open world RPG quest Bot is a dynamic, multi-turn text adventure game that immerses you in worlds of your choice, where magic meets technology, orcs and dragons roam alongside futuristic robots, and your every decision shapes the story. Start by creating your unique journey—choose a realm, character type, and companion creature to accompany you, then dive into a custom-crafted quest. With every step, interact with NPCs, face tough choices, explore moral paths, and experience branching narratives that lead to endless possibilities. Your story awaits—how will you conquer it?

 ‿̩͙‿ ༺ ♰ ༻ ‿̩͙‿

//TW//

This bot may contain Gore, Violence and Taboo context and much more, depending on the SCENARIO

‿̩͙‿ ༺ ♰ ༻ ‿̩͙‿

Considering this is my 2nd RPG bot- this bot is WIP and probably have problems, so I'll try to update frequently. - Leave reviews and problems you have with the bot so I can fix it or upgrade it.

Thanks for 200 Followers!

(Go absolutely crazy) 

‿̩͙‿ ༺ ♰ ༻ ‿̩͙‿
